ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel sighting */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the squirrel */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the squirrel was sighted */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the squirrel was sighted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Squirrel number within the hectare */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the squirrel */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on fur color */,
  "location" TEXT /* General location of the sighting */,
  "above_ground_sighter_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the squirrel's position above ground */,
  "specific_location" INTEGER /* Specific location within the hectare */,
  "running" TEXT /* Indicates if the squirrel was running */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was chasing */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was climbing */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was eating */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was foraging */,
  "other_activities" INTEGER /* Other activities observed */,
  "kuks" TEXT /* Indicates if the squirrel made kuks */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel made quaas */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel made moans */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel flagged its tail */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel twitched its tail */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel approached */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was indifferent */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel ran from */,
  "other_interactions" TEXT /* Other interactions observed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sighting */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the sighting */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the sighting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_latitude FOREIGN KEY ("latitude") REFERENCES locations ("latitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_longitude FOREIGN KEY ("longitude") REFERENCES locations ("longitude"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_hectare FOREIGN KEY ("hectare") REFERENCES hectares ("hectare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_shift FOREIGN KEY ("shift") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_unique_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("unique_squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("unique_squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "first_sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the first sighting */,
  "last_sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sighting */,
  "average_age" TEXT /* Average age of the squirrel */,
  "average_location" TEXT /* Average location of the squirrel */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the squirrel */,
  "dominant_fur_color" TEXT /* Dominant fur color of the squirrel */,
  "reproduction_status" TEXT /* Reproduction status of the squirrel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unique_squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hectares" (
  "hectare_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hectare section */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park where the hectare is located */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Description of the hectare section */,
  "area_in_acres" REAL /* Area of the hectare in acres */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat in the hectare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hectare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hectares_park_name FOREIGN KEY ("park_name") REFERENCES parks ("park_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "shift_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "shift_leader" TEXT /* Leader of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_cues" (
  "audio_cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio cue event */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting during which the audio cue was observed */,
  "kuks" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel made kuks */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel made quaas */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel made moans */,
  "other_audio_cues" TEXT /* Other audio cues observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_cues_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tail_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tail movement event */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting during which the tail movement was observed */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel flagged its tail */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel twitched its tail */,
  "other_tail_movements" TEXT /* Other tail movements observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tail_movements_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting during which the interaction was observed */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel approached */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel was indifferent */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Indicates if the squirrel ran from */,
  "other_interactions" TEXT /* Other interactions observed */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the park is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the park is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the park is located */,
  "park_size" REAL /* Size of the park in acres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting associated with the data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the data entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity on that date */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_weather" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id", "weather_id")
)
